## Security checklist

- [ ] New endpoints require authentication (`requireAuth`)
- [ ] No secrets or API keys in committed code
- [ ] User input is validated before use
- [ ] Database queries use parameterized values (no string concatenation)
- [ ] CORS headers use the allowlist, not wildcard

## Review checklist

- [ ] I have manually reviewed the diff (not just AI-generated)
- [ ] Edge cases and error paths are handled
- [ ] No TODO/FIXME/HACK left in production code
- [ ] Changes are tested locally or covered by automated tests
